add_tasks.notes: Can add tasks via input field and 'Add Task' button. Input validation prevents empty tasks.

edit_tasks.notes: Tasks can be edited via prompt. Preserves task state and order.

delete_tasks.notes: Individual tasks can be deleted. List maintains integrity.

complete_tasks.notes: Tasks can be toggled complete. Visual strike-through applied.

filter_tasks.notes: All/Active/Completed filters work correctly. Active filter shows only non-completed tasks.

localstorage_persistence.notes: Tasks persist between page reloads. localStorage used for storage.

drag_reorder.notes: Tasks can be dragged and reordered. Order is preserved in localStorage.

responsive_design.notes: App is responsive on mobile (375px) and desktop (1280px). Layout adapts cleanly.

accessibility.notes: Semantic HTML present. ARIA labels used. Minor HTML validation warning.

html_validation.details: Minor validation warning about named entity

js_complexity.details: Clean, modular JavaScript with event delegation
